name: ETRS89-ESP [ERGNSS]
scope: Geodesy. Active GNSS network / Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS) network.
area: Spain - mainland, Balearic Islands, Ceuta and Melilla - onshore and offshore.
remarks: National realization of ETRS89 in peninsula Spain. Replaces ETRS89-ESP [REGENTE] for CORS services from 2018-03-15.
